Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: There are two types of sonar: active and passive.
By default, passive sonar is always enabled for player ships, submarines, and sonobuoys dropped by aircraft. Passive sonar listens to undersea noise and detects contacts based on noise levels.

Note: passive sonar effectiveness is drastically reduced when ships are moving at higher speeds! If you are attempting to locate contacts using shipboard sonar, always slow down to Ahead 1/3 (or even All Stop) to listen for contacts.
